programme.title: Blessed Because You Believe
programme.desc: We live in a time when it’s getting harder and harder to believe things. But it’s so important to remember that in a world full of illusion and deception, God is still true. Pastor Holly Furtick shares from Mary’s perspective some truths about God we can believe as we cling to faith this Christmas.

programme.title: The War Of Whispers
programme.desc: Ever feel like there are too many voices telling you what to do and who to be? The enemy whispers fear, doubt, and distraction, but God’s whisper brings peace, purpose, and direction. When you stop agreeing with the enemy’s lies and start trusting the whisper of the One who sent you, you’ll find confidence in where — and who — you are.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: A new team commander emerges, but can they hold the title? Contestants face long-range shooting challenges, mastering both standard artillery and the powerful 50 Caliber rifle. The intensity continues with surprise physical training led by a SEAL Team 6 warrior and MMA Champion, pushing contestants to their breaking point. This episode is a relentless test of endurance, skill, and resilience, as the competition intensifies and only the most determined will claim the title of Ultimate Competition Lead.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail 1933
programme.desc: A young John Wayne rides tall in Sagebrush Trail, a gripping tale of justice and redemption. Wrongly accused of murder, John Brant (Wayne) escapes from prison and sets out to clear his name. Along the way, he falls in with an outlaw gang and finds himself torn between the lawless life and his fight to prove his innocence. Packed with gunfights, treachery, and frontier grit, this early Wayne Western showcases the making of a legend.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang 1969
programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.

programme.title: Romance on the Range 1942
programme.desc: Roy Rogers brings song and spirit to Romance on the Range! When cattle rustlers stir up trouble on the frontier, Roy saddles up to protect the ranchers and bring the outlaws to justice. Along the way, his courage and charm win more than just gunfights, as romance blossoms under the wide-open skies. With the Sons of the Pioneers providing harmony and plenty of action on the trail, this Western blends music, adventure, and heart in true Roy Rogers style.
